positive: A highly stylized and symmetrical vintage botanical illustration of a fantastical forest scene. Focus on large, exaggerated leaves, exotic, bioluminescent glowing mushrooms, and swirling vines forming a natural, intricate silhouette. The color palette should be deep emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and touches of luminous gold, suggesting a twilight jungle. The composition must be perfectly balanced and circular, suitable for repeating seamless pattern or a central apparel print. Use strong, crisp line art combined with subtle watercolor washes for depth. Clean lines, deep contrast, minimalist background space, vector graphic style, highly detailed, forest flora, symmetrical, magical realism.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, signature, watermark, logo, messy, abstract, poor anatomy, artifacts, muted, washed out, cartoon, realistic photography, lowres, extra limbs
